title: TierPVP
description: TierPVP One top plugin elo server smp
body:
# ⚔️ TierPVP - Competitive PvP Ranking System

TierPVP is a customizable PvP ranking plugin designed to create a fair and competitive progression system for Minecraft servers. It features a structured tier system, configurable point mechanics, and anti-abuse protections to ensure balanced gameplay.

---

## ✨ Features

### 📊 Tier & Point System

* Configurable point gain/loss for kills and deaths (default: +2 / -2)
* Supports negative points
* 10-tier progression system (LT5 → HT1)
* Broadcast and sound effects when reaching the highest tier

---

### 🛡️ Anti-Farming System

* Daily kill limit (auto-reset at 00:00)
* Prevents abuse using alternate accounts
* Fully configurable limits

---

### 💰 Rewards & Progression

* Execute console commands as rewards
* Automatic rewards on rank up (money, titles, sounds)
* `/tier top` GUI leaderboard system

---

### ⚙️ Customization

* Fully editable messages
* Debug mode for tracking PvP events
* Easy configuration for server owners

---

## 🖥️ Compatibility

* Minecraft: 1.21.x
* Platforms: Paper / Spigot / Folia
* Dependency: Vault (for economy features)

---

## 📜 Commands

* `/tier top` – Open leaderboard
* `/tier help` – View commands

---

## 📌 Disclaimer

This plugin is independently developed and is not affiliated with any server, network, or existing project.
